## Crop types

```{r}
#| label: crop types table

crop_types_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "crop_types_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::crop_types(
  crop_df = crop_types_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  crop_type_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$crop_types_var),
  temp_crop_val = as.numeric(params_df$crop_type_temp_val),
  perm_crop_val = as.numeric(params_df$crop_type_perm_val),
  group_var = "supervisor"
)

```
